statement: The Guo–Krattenthaler divisibilities (6n−1) ∣ C(12n,3n) and (6n−1) ∣ C(12n,4n) hold for every n = 1..8, and (66n−1) ∣ C(330n,88n) at n = 1 — kernel-attested instances of the all-n theorems of Guo & Krattenthaler (2014)
falsifiable_claim: an n between 1 and 8 with (6n−1) ∤ C(12n,3n) or (6n−1) ∤ C(12n,4n), or 65 ∤ C(330,88)
theorem_src: theorem gk_divisibilities : (∀ n < 8, (6*(n+1) - 1) ∣ Nat.choose (12*(n+1)) (3*(n+1)) ∧ (6*(n+1) - 1) ∣ Nat.choose (12*(n+1)) (4*(n+1))) ∧ (65 : ℕ) ∣ Nat.choose 330 88

references.citation: Guo, V. J. W., & Krattenthaler, C. (2014). Some divisibility properties of binomial and q-binomial coefficients. Journal of Number Theory, 135, 167–184.
